In Oak’s Lab after talking to Blue; starter selection sequence has advanced and we should trigger the rival battle next.
Need to interact with Blue again to continue progression.

### Action_reasoning
We are in Field state facing Blue’s sprite nearby. Using the object interaction tool is the most reliable way to trigger the next required dialog/battle.

### Actions
use_tool(interact_with_object, (object_name="SPRITE_BLUE_1"))
